titleStmt.title: SII 18.209: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 209. (B.K. No. 90 of 1932-33.) HĀVĒRI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: South beam in the navaraṅgamaṇḍapa in the temple of Purasiddhēs11vara.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the 18th year of the reign of Siṁgaṇadēva, Sarvadhāri, Jyēshṭha śu. 3, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 1228, May 8, Monday. It records a grant of money made by the merchants (nakharas) of Hāvari, for offerings to god Vināyakadēva (in the temple) of god Svayaṁbhu-Siddhanāthadēva. Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Lakshmīpāḷadēva is stated to be the governor at that time.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu ya(yā)davanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷapratāpacakravartti śrīsiṁ haṇadēvavarusada 18 neya sarvvadhārisaṁvatsarada jēṣṭa sudha 3 sōmavāradaṁdu svasti samasa (sta)pa(pra)sasi(sti)sahitaṁ śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ saraṇa(ṇā)gata
vajrapaṁjaraṁ śrīlakṣumipāḷadēvana rājyadalu śrīmadanādiyagraha raṁ ha variya nakharaṁgaḷu śrīsvayaṁbhusidhdhanāthadēvara vināyakadēvara Upaha rakke koṭṭa gadyāṇa nālkaṟa 4 priddhi tiṁgaḷiṁge haṇavoRead hā.
ndaṟalu varusakke gadyāṇa 1ma 2maṁ(jñā) narāsidēvaruṁ mahājanaṁgaḷu yi dharmma ma Ācaṁdrārkkāṁbaraṁ pratipāḷisuvaru maṁgaḷa maha(hā)śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 18.209 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
